entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00027) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $1,656,470

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TREX SUPPORTS PROTOTYPING EFFORTS USING OTA AGREEMENTS FOR PEO-STRI AND ACC-ORL. THIS MODIFICATION PROVIDED INCREMENTAL FUNDING TO THE MITS PROGRAM, FUNDING FOR AN ECP ON THE UAS DEVICE FOLLOWING SOW COLLABORATION AND UPDATED POC INFORMATION AND INVOICING PROCEDURES.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00028) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of -$38,860

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TREX SUPPORTS PROTOTYPING EFFORTS USING OTA AGREEMENTS FOR PEO-STRI AND ACC-ORL. THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DEOBLIGATE $38,860 FROM CLIN 2001 DUE TO A LINE OF ACCOUNTING ERROR.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00029) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $1,538,220

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRAINING AND READINESS ACCELERATOR (TREX) SUPPORTS PROTOTYPING EFFORTS USING OTHER TRANSACTION AUTHORITIES(OTA) AGREEMENTS FOR PROGRAM EXECUTIVE OFFICE-SIMULATION, TRAINING AND INSTRUMENTATION AND ARMY CONTRACTING COMMAND-ORLANDO. THIS MODIFICATION ACTION EXTENDS THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR CLINS 2022, 2023, 2026, AND 2027. THIS ACTION WILL ALSO ADD COST AND SCOPE TO CLINS 2026 AND 2027.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00030) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $115,771

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRAINING AND READINESS ACCELERATOR SUPPORTS PROTOTYPING EFFORTS USING OTHER TRANSACTION AUTHORITIES AGREEMENTS FOR PROGRAM EXECUTIVE OFFICE-SIMULATION, TRAINING, AND INSTRUMENTATION AND ARMY CONTRACTING COMMAND-ORLANDO. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REOBLIGATE FUNDING DUE TO A LINE OF ACCOUNTING ERROR AND ADD FEE THAT WAS ERRONEOUSLY LEFT OFF FROM P00029.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00031) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRAINING AND READINESS ACCELERATOR SUPPORTS PROTOTYPING EFFORTS USING OTHER TRANSACTION AUTHORITIES AGREEMENTS FOR PROGRAM EXECUTIVE OFFICE-SIMULATION, TRAINING, AND INSTRUMENTATION AND ARMY CONTRACTING COMMAND-ORLANDO. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD FEE ON CLINS 2026 AND 2027. ADDITIONALLY, EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE ON CLIN 1040.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00032) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $3,631,672

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRAINING AND READINESS ACCELERATOR SUPPORTS PROTOTYPING EFFORTS USING OTHER TRANSACTION AUTHORITIES AGREEMENTS FOR PROGRAM EXECUTIVE OFFICE-SIMULATION, TRAINING, AND INSTRUMENTATION AND ARMY CONTRACTING COMMAND-ORLANDO. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE FUNDING FOR CONTINUED USE OF THIS EFFORT.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00033) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE RESERVED CLINS 4000 - 4020.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00034) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION IS ADMINISTRATIVELY UPDATE TO RESERVE CLINS 4000-4020.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00035) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $475,125

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: P00035 - THIS MODIFICATION 1. EXTENDS THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE ON CLIN 2027 (NOBLE IDE PALANTIR) AND 2. ADD SLINS 202707, 202708 TO SUPPORT THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE EXTENSION AND NSTXL FEE.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00036) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $1,772,425

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: IMMEDIATE OFFICE OF THE SECRETARY OF DEFENSE

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: P00036 - THIS MODIFICATION FUNDS CLINS 1022 AND 1023; INCORPORATES A 3 MONTH NO COST EXTENSION TO LVM, CLIN 1060; INCORPORATES CLIN 0009 FOR MBPS PHASE II DEMO; AND ADDS NEW AGREEMENTS OFFICER.
